title: crepis glauca
intro: Crepis glauca, also known as Rough Hawk's-beard, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that is native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Crepis glauca include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Crepis glauca can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
